title: Screening: Buildings Are Heavy — A Documentary Film by Kim Shively
body:
Event listing for a public screening of *Buildings Are Heavy* at Denver Month of Video, July 12, 2025. Directed by [[people/kim-shively|Kim Shively]] — Colin Ward's girlfriend and Aquakota team member.

From the listing: *"Set in Denver, Buildings Are Heavy is an intimate portrait of place and how people and the spaces they inhabit shape the identity of a city. The film's central characters are three longstanding artist-run spaces (also known as DIY spaces) as well as a hundred-year-old bank building located in north Denver."*

This film is **priority research material** — Shively's direct relationship to Colin and the Rhinoceropolis world means it almost certainly contains footage, archival material, or testimony not yet in the archive. **Needs a full watch and extraction pass (Dyl-gated).**

**SPN capture needed:** https://www.denvermov.com/events/buildings-are-heavy-a-documentary-film-by-kim-shively
